response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional software engineering credentials with 20 years of experience and roles at top-tier companies, this is a fundamental technical mismatch. The role explicitly requires a C++ developer with embedded systems and industrial automation expertise; Bogdan's C++ experience is minimal (6 months at National Instruments in 2014–2015) and his entire career has been focused on web development, full-stack JavaScript/TypeScript, and SaaS platforms. He lacks experience with multi-threaded C++, IoT, industrial protocols, security standards (IEC 62443), and embedded systems—all core to this position.
strengths: Exceptional breadth of software engineering expertise across 20 years, with proven impact at Stripe, Shopify, and other top-tier companies
Strong architectural and design thinking demonstrated through platform design, mentoring programs, and open-source contributions
Excellent software craftsmanship with demonstrated commitment to testing, CI/CD, and knowledge sharing
concerns: C++ expertise is minimal and outdated (6 months at National Instruments in 2014–2015); career has been almost entirely JavaScript/TypeScript and web development
No background in industrial automation, embedded systems, IoT, or industrial protocols (Modbus, IEC 61850, OPC UA); all experience is SaaS/web-focused
No demonstrated expertise in security standards (IEC 62443, SDL), multi-threaded systems, MQTT, or message brokers—key responsibilities of this role

key_factors.factor: Industrial automation and embedded systems background
